description: Multiview dependency automation (Renovate — free OSS). Digest-pins the container base images + the FFmpeg base-image (FFMPEG_IMAGE) tags, and SHA-pins GitHub Actions. NO paid services.

packageRules.description: Pin all GitHub Actions to an immutable commit SHA (keep the human-readable version as a comment). Group the bumps into one PR.

Pin every Docker base image (FROM <ref>) to a @sha256: digest and keep the tag. Covers deploy/Dockerfile, deploy/Dockerfile.nvidia, deploy/Dockerfile.ffmpeg. Excludes the FFMPEG_IMAGE build-arg, handled below.

Pin + bump the published Multiview FFmpeg base image referenced via the FFMPEG_IMAGE build-arg default and the FROM ${FFMPEG_IMAGE} stage. Keep the 8.1.1-<flavour> tag; add/refresh the @sha256: digest on first run so the app images link an immutable base. A separate PR so the FFmpeg-rebuild → app-pin coupling is reviewable.
